nasb.text: When His own people heard of this, they went out to take custody of Him; for they were saying, “He has lost His senses.”

esv.text: And when his family heard it, they went out to seize him, for they were saying, “He is out of his mind.”

cnv.text: 那些和他在一起的人聽見了，就出來抓住他，因為他們說他癲狂了。

ccb.text: 祂的亲属听见这个消息，就出来要拉住祂，因为人们说祂疯了。

csbs.text: 耶稣的亲属听说了，就来制止他，因为有人说他发疯了。
